nodes.name: Prepare Email Data
nodes.notes: V6.1: Complete email data preparation (UNCHANGED from V6)

nodes.name: Render Template
nodes.notes: V6.1: Direct template read with fs.readFileSync (NO READ NODE NEEDED)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_logs (
  recipient_email,
  recipient_name,
  subject,
  template_used,
  status,
  sent_at,
  metadata
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'sent', NOW(), $5)

nodes.name: Log Email Sent
nodes.notes: V6.1: Query CORRECTED - 5 parameters ($1-$5), status hardcoded

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_logs (
  recipient_email,
  recipient_name,
  subject,
  template_used,
  status,
  sent_at,
  error_message,
  metadata
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'failed', NOW(), $5, $6)

additionalFields.queryParameters: ={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.to }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.template_data.name }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.subject }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.template }},={{ $json.message }},={{ JSON.stringify({ error: $json.message, source: $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.source }) }}

nodes.notes: V6.1: Query CORRECTED - 6 parameters ($1-$6), status hardcoded
